---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new capability, improvement, or idea
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What would you like?
A clear description of the feature.

## Why?
How would this help the agent survive, earn, or evolve better?

## Proposed implementation
If you have ideas about how to implement this, describe them here.

## Are you willing to submit a PR?
- [ ] Yes, I'd like to implement this
- [ ] I'd like help implementing this
- [ ] No, just suggesting
